title: How to add icons to external links with CSS

og.title: How to add icons to external links with CSS
og.description:
As part of my ongoing updates to my personal site, I decided to add icons after all external links.
Today, I wanted to show you how I did it. Let’s dig in!
Why? I do a lot of linking on my site, and it’s not always obvious when a link will keep you on-site vs. take you somewhere else.
Using [target="_blank"] forces links to open in a new tab or window, but this is considered an anti-pattern for accessibility reasons.
